{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320175754AD2C25E31DBB7B0A6C4D"}"},"total":11},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7611183026569806654","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的好看，也看过非常多关于这种类型的文套路都已经摸透，而作者大大这篇文章让我眼前一亮，真的是特别特别好看，作者大大的每个作品都是非常精彩，整个逻辑线清晰真的超级推荐"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772118610,"group_id":"7608250387321064473","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更300字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nzi1KnDlINvyJX+Gy23x7NQ=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3da195ad0e764c5fbed3fecb3cba8515~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776530883&x-signature=ksZxP1bzrn0hC1dKDCJTzatZhBs%3D","user_id":"303879243966080","user_name":"阳阳长久版"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"303879243966080","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7608250387321064473","book_info":{"abstract":"【双男主+无限流+共感娃娃+双洁HE+有副CP】
无限游戏入侵现实，工程师傅松呈被迫卷入游戏《死亡派对》。
开局天崩？他竟与游戏内赫赫有名的疯批大佬余淮亭强制绑定【情人】身份！
伤害同调，痛楚平分，同时获得对方【共感娃娃】。
前期两人分隔不同副本。
余淮亭在S级战场以暴制暴，拳打NPC，浑身浴血；
新手村傅松呈痛到痉挛，差点被余淮亭连累死。
“什么垃圾情人！”
不过傅松呈也没放过余淮亭，对着【共感娃娃】疯狂抚摸——
【系统提示：互动成功！获得速度加成10%，攻击加成5%】
【系统提示：互动成功！......】
【系统提示：互动成功！......】
傅松呈借抚摸娃娃刷爆属性，通关副本。
余淮亭在高级副本一边大杀四方，一边忍受着体内莫名窜起的诡异酥麻与躁动。
“能不能让人好好打架！”
...
后期二人组队，疯批大佬秒变粘人精。
刚才还徒手撕怪物的余淮亭，转头将傅松呈抵在墙角，嗓音沙哑。
“宝贝，娃娃玩够了吗？现在，换真人让你撸个够。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/5e690b5f35a069d953fb0fcee3139339~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"喜乐忧","author_id":"","book_id":"7608250387321064473","book_name":"无限流：开局和疯批绑定共感情人","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301008","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2410人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":484,"name":"HE","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=484&name=HE&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7610831590989496857","read_count":"2410","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"117690"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"49","tags":"双男主,纯爱,现代,穿越,无限流,双洁,HE","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5e690b5f35a069d953fb0fcee3139339~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779184674&x-signature=%2FpfKNeZ9sskUezDqFZV%2Bymbyaac%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"58771971790","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320175754AD2C25E31DBB7B0A6C4D"}"},"relate_info
